case_title: DENNIS D. MIDDLETON VS. AURORA MANUFACTURING INC. AKA AURORA INDUSTRY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,916.00 FILED BY MIDDLETON, DENNIS D. AS TO DEFENDANT AURORA MANUFACTURING INC. AKA AURORA INDUSTRY LABUNSKY, MICHAEL MALYSHEV, DMITRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DMITRY MALYSHEV, AND MICHAEL LABUNSKY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-28-2008 AT 1:30PM. NO SERVICE OF PROCESS.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO PLAINTIFF MIDDLETON, DENNIS D. HEARING SET FOR MAY-12-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00). SERVED JAN-08-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AURORA MANUFACTURING INC. AKA AURORA INDUSTRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDDLETON, DENNIS D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AURORA MANUFACTURING INC. AKA AURORA INDUSTRY $1,916.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,021.00, DEFENDANT MICHAEL LABANSKY AND DMITRY MALYSHEV DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MIDDLETON, DENNIS D.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2007 - CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
